title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius, Emperor of Rome
summary: Meditations is a collection of personal reflections by Marcus Aurelius, Roman emperor and Stoic philosopher, written as private notes during troubled reigns. He records gratitude to teachers and relatives, counsels self-discipline, duty, acceptance of fate, and rational governance. The Introduction recounts his life—education under Hadrian and Antoninus, wars with Parthia and northern tribes, domestic losses, Avidius Cassius's revolt, Faustina's death, and Commodus's succession. Stoic doctrine—physics, logic, ethics, virtue as living according to nature, the Criterion and impressions—frames his practice. Themes include mortality, providence, restraint of passion, service, and aligning individual reason with the cosmic order and practical daily moral guidance.

characters.name: Marcus Aurelius Antoninus
characters.lifespan: Born 121; ruled as emperor; campaigned on frontiers; died in Pannonia in 180

characters.name: M. Annius Verus (father)
characters.lifespan: Died in Marcus's childhood

characters.name: Annius Verus (grandfather, consular)
characters.lifespan: Adopted Marcus; served as consular; predeceased Marcus's adult life

characters.name: Hadrian
characters.lifespan: Imperial sponsor of Marcus's early honors

characters.name: Annia Galeria Faustina (aunt)
characters.lifespan: Married to Antoninus Pius; aunt of Marcus

characters.name: Antoninus Pius
characters.lifespan: Adopted Marcus; reigned until his death in 161

characters.name: Faustina (wife)
characters.age: wife of Marcus; adult (no specific ages)
characters.personality: beloved by Marcus though subject to scandal in sources
characters.lifespan: Bore many children; died on eastern journey during Marcus's reign

characters.name: L. Ceionius Commodus / Lucius Aurelius Verus
characters.personality: junior colleague; indulged in excess according to text
characters.lifespan: Associated emperor who died during campaigns (169)

characters.name: Pertinax
characters.age: adult military commander (no dates in excerpt)
characters.lifespan: Served under Marcus in military command

characters.name: Vologeses III
characters.age: Parthian leader at time of revolt
characters.lifespan: Led Parthian uprising against Rome mentioned in text

characters.name: Avidius Cassius
characters.lifespan: Proclaimed himself emperor in report of Marcus's death; assassinated

characters.name: Commodus
characters.age: son of Marcus (survived to adulthood; age at succession not given)
characters.personality: described as weak, worthless, and a bloodthirsty tyrant
characters.lifespan: Succeeded Marcus; his reign (12 years) undone many of Marcus's policies

characters.name: Justin
characters.lifespan: Mentioned as martyred during Marcus's reign

characters.name: Polycarp
characters.lifespan: Martyred at Smyrna during this period

characters.name: Zeno
characters.personality: founder of Stoicism; teacher of virtue according to nature
characters.lifespan: Ancient philosopher credited with founding the Stoic school

characters.name: Chrysippus
characters.lifespan: Major early Stoic whose work organized the school

characters.name: Crates (the Cynic)
characters.lifespan: Mentioned as one of Zeno's teachers

characters.name: Numa
characters.personality: pious ancestral figure claimed in family descent
characters.lifespan: Ancient legendary ancestor cited by Marcus's family

characters.name: Diocletian
characters.personality: strong ruler whose later actions are compared historically
characters.lifespan: Mentioned as later emperor under whom empire split

characters.name: Trajan
characters.personality: praised as better in treatment of Christians
characters.lifespan: Referenced for comparative policy

characters.name: Marcomanni (tribe)
characters.lifespan: Participated in frontier wars against Rome

characters.name: Quadi (tribe)
characters.personality: northern tribal opponent; involved in battle with storm legend
characters.lifespan: Engaged in wars mentioned in Marcus's campaigns

characters.name: Sarmatians (tribe)
characters.lifespan: Mentioned among tribes opposing Rome

characters.name: Catti (tribe)
characters.lifespan: Mentioned among frontier tribes

characters.name: Jazyges (tribe)
characters.lifespan: Mentioned among frontier tribes
